mnemonics: King Philip Came Over For Good Spaghetti (KPCOGS) - Descriptive Statistics
Elephants Never Forget (ENF) - Univariate Data Analysis
keyPoints: Big Data Analysis Framework: Data Ingestion, Data Processing, Data Storage, Data Analysis, and Data Visualization
Descriptive Statistics: Measures of Central Tendency (Mean, Median, Mode), Measures of Variability (Range, Variance, Standard Deviation)
Univariate Data Analysis: Summarizing and Describing a Single Variable, Identifying Patterns and Trends
